title: ServiceNow Application Engineer (Ref 101)
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Customer Engagement & Solution Design
  • Technical Development & Configuration
  • Design and develop App Engine applications using App Engine Studio, data models, ACLs, UI Builder, and workspace components.
  • Build and configure Business Rules, Script Includes, Client Scripts, UI Policies, UI Actions, Flow Designer, and automation workflows.
  • Develop custom experiences, Portals, and widgets using JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and AngularJS (where applicable).
  • Implement integrations using Integration Hub, REST/SOAP APIs, MID Server, and custom connectors.
  • Configure, implement, and support modules such as ITSM/CSM/HRSD/ITOM/App Engine based on project scope.
  • Perform unit testing, support SIT/UAT, conduct code reviews, and ensure alignment with governance frameworks.

Requirement

  • 3–5+ years of hands-on ServiceNow development experience.
  • Strong proficiency in JavaScript, Glide API, server- and client-side scripting.
  • Practical experience with App Engine, custom applications, scoped applications, Flow Designer, and Integration Hub.
  • Experience with ITSM / CSM / HRSD / ITOM / CMDB or enterprise workflows.
  • Experience developing portals, widgets, or custom UI (HTML/CSS/AngularJS).
  • Strong understanding of API integrations, REST/SOAP, and MID Server.

Interested applicants, Please send your updated resume in Word format to hres@itcspl.com

Please indicate Job Code "ServiceNow Application Engineer - 101" on email subject


We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.


Bacalso John Bryan Bedayo (Reg No. R1106648)

IT Consultancy & Services Pte Ltd

EA No: 92C5311


Please visit www.itcspl.com to learn more information about ITC

postedCompany.description:
IT Consultancy & Services Pte Ltd is an established IT Staffing and Executive Search firm in Singapore with a commitment to excellence. Since 1991, ITC has built up a reputable and valued clientele base of leading MNC, FSI Technology companies and Healthcare companies.  

We are consistently seeking dedicated and highly skilled IT Professionals / Specialists with a high standard of performance to join our various clients in the following areas: Infrastructure Support / Implementation, Software Development, Functional Support, Project Management, IT Management, Enterprise Solution, IT Sales & Presales roles. We also work on Corporate Functions such as HR, Finance & Accounting, Marketing, etc. and Healthcare related roles. 


Our Services: Executive Search | Contract Staffing | Outsourcing Services | Consultancy Services
postedCompany.name: IT CONSULTANCY & SERVICES PTE LTD
